stemHtml: What does the instruction "Fastair 345 standby 118.9 for TOWER" mean?

options.a: Fastair 345 should standby on the current frequency.
options.c: Fastair 345 should listen on frequency 118.9 on which TOWER will initiate further communications.
options.d: Fastair 345 should change frequency to 118.9 on which aerodrome data are being broadcast.
